name: Churu Cat Treats Seafood Variety 20 Tubes
shortDescription: Churu Cat Lickable Treats Seafood Variety 20ct creamy, low-calorie cat treats made with tuna, salmon, and seafood flavors. 91% moisture, grain-free, with added taurine for hydration and health.
description: Delight your cat with ocean-inspired flavors they’ll love with the Churu Seafood Variety Pack . These creamy, lickable purée treats are made with high-quality ingredients , including real tuna, salmon, chicken, and seafood flavors, delivering irresistible taste while supporting hydration and overall health. Each tube contains 91% moisture and just 6 calories , making Churu an excellent low calorie treat for daily bonding, enrichment, or as a food topper for picky eaters. Why Cats Love Churu: Hydration Support: High moisture content helps promote healthy fluid intake Low-Calorie Treat: Only 6 kcal per tube—ideal for weight-conscious feeding Clean Ingredients: Grain-free and free from preservatives, artificial colors, and carrageenan Added Taurine & Vitamin E: Supports heart health, vision, and immune function Interactive Feeding: Perfect for hand-feeding, topping wet or dry food, or hiding medication Seafood Variety Includes (20 Tubes): Tuna with Scallop ×5 Tuna with Salmon ×5 Chicken with Scallop ×5 Chicken with Shrimp Flavor ×5 Suitable for cats of all life stages , from kittens to seniors, this variety pack keeps treat time exciting while supporting everyday wellness. Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 7.00% Crude Fat (min): 0.20% Crude Fiber (max): 0.30% Moisture (max): 91.00% Vitamin E (min): 310 IU/kg Taurine (min): 0.025% Calorie Content: 430 kcal/kg | 6.0 kcal per tube (ME) Net Weight: 10.0 oz (0.5 oz × 20 tubes) Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. Not intended as a complete meal. Always provide fresh drinking water and consult your veterinarian regularly. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as possible.
